title: title
intro:
hello!

this site is under construction and is meant to be a repository of resources of interest for the exact sciences, with some conent on philosophy, neuroscience, literature, cinema, and whatever topic may tickle my mind. it is made by an engineer, student and aspiring scientist, an atheist who thinks darwin's idea was the most important insight of all time, for like-minded people. all the scientific content is factual and refers directly to the source and author; when it comes to films and literature, it's mostly my personal views.

i think what one does may - or not - define who one is, proportionally to the length of time and dedication, is incorporated into one's self, and before being who i am, i've lived rough, washed dishes, was a construction labourer, volunteer journalist and attended a press conference invited by the brazilian ambassador in an european capital where i lived. i was also a graphic designer, admin assistant of several kinds, squeegee guy, photographer, barman, online content editor, electrician, night hotel porter, team manager, sous-chef, truck loader, gardener for the fourth richest guy in world (or sixth, who knows), factory worker, beggar and i forget what else. i even free-lanced for uno for a while. for last many years i've been a software developer and my hobbies are pretty much this here content. i kind of see my self as a poor man's polymath.

thus, this space is called pragmata, which means "things" in greek, and i sort of mean it as "practical". the original idea was factotum, but i didn't want to plagiarise bukowski.

i also dislike uppercase and proper punctuation, and the words in cyrillic script underneath the ukranian flag mean "free ukraine" (vil'na ukraina)
